title: Note
description: A desk Note (content/synced). Canonical hub emission: holdspeak/db/models.py NoteRecord.to_dict(). Required = what EVERY surface must send; the hub's pull emission additionally always carries updated_at/last_modified/deleted (pinned by tests/unit/test_primitive_contract.py, not by this schema, so an iPad push without sync-plumbing fields still validates).
